case_title: MURPHY, DENIS T. vs. JOHNSTON, EDWARD et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MURPHY, DENIS T. AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSTON, EDWARD CRANE, MERTON DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHNSTON, EDWARD CRANE, MERTON ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHNSTON, EDWARD CRANE, MERTON ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHNSTON, EDWARD CRANE, MERTON ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHNSTON, EDWARD CRANE, MERTON
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHNSTON, EDWARD CRANE, MERTON

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MURPHY, DENIS T. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-09-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-15-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGMENT IS BY STIPULATION. THE LEASE FOR 43 HAIGHT STREET IS FORFEITED. A WRIT OF POSSESSION CAN ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT ACTUAL EVICTION SHALL BE STAYED UNTIL 9-1-95, 11:59 PM. PLAINTIFF, DENIS MURPHY, SHALL BE AWARDED $3,000 AS A COMPROMISED MONEY JUDGMENT. THE SECURITY DEPOSIT, IN THIS MATTER, SHALL NOT BE RETURNED. ON 10-10-95 AND EVERY MONTH THEREAFTER, DEFENDANTS SHALL PAY FIFTY DOLLARS TOWARD THE MONEY OWED. THIS MONEY SHALL BE DEPOSITED WITH PLAINTIFF AT HIS OFFICE--1417 VALENCIA, SAN FRANCISCO. IF ALL PAYMENTS ARE MET, INTEREST SHALL NOT ACCRUE. IF A PAYMENT IS MISSED, PLAINTIFF MAY MOVE FOR BALANCE OWED PLUS 10% INTEREST. THERE AREN'T ANY OTHER ADULTS ON THE PREMISES. ANY PROPERTY LEFT ON THE PREMISES AFTER 9-1-95 SHALL BE DEEMED ABANDONED. THERE WILL NOT BE ANY STAYS OF EXECUTION. EACH SIDE SHALL BEAR ITS OWN COSTS.
